name: coOnEmergency
title: coOnEmergency
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coOnEmergency( dword nodeId, dword errorCode, dword errorRegister );
This function is called if an emergency message was received. Data of manufacturer emergency codes can be read with coThisGetData.
errorCode Emergency error code, value range 0..65.535
errorRegister Content of the error register
Example void coOnEmergency( dword nodeId, dword errorCode, dword errorRegister ){ write( "Emergency message from node %d with error code 0x%X received", nodeId, errorCode );}
